Today

Post Courier

Papua New Guinea's 'trupla' leading Daily Newspaper Since 1969.The Post-Courier is proud of its record as the voice of PNG. We were there when the nation took its first bold steps towards independence. Since that time, we have fearlessly recorded the nation's progress.

Papua New Guinea gears up for the annual Trukai Fun Run on July 7, set to unite communities across 10 locations nationwide under the theme "Our Steps, Their Dreams."

This year’s event, co-hosted by the Papua New Guinea Olympic Committee and Trukai Industries Limited, holds special significance as it rallies support for Team PNG ahead of their journey to the 2024 Paris Olympic Games.
